title: Science teachers come together at conference
summary_en: Over 50 local teachers attended the Hoosier Association of Science Teachers, Inc., mini conference at the IU School of Education, where they heard from IU researchers, learned how to incorporate new statewide Science of Reading standards into their lessons, and addressed the use of AI in classrooms.
title_cn: 印第安纳大学伯明顿分校举办霍齐尔科学教师协会小型研讨会
